metadata.description: Multi-Agent Orchestrator (MAO) — Intelligent model tiering, DAG scheduling, git worktrees, and self-correction loops for Claude Code

plugins.name: skills-directory
plugins.description: Skill Codex — browsable index of all MAO skills with one-line purpose summaries. Use /skills-directory to discover which skill to activate for your task. Covers orchestration, TDD, security, API design, backend patterns, E2E testing, coding standards, verification, and eval-driven development.

plugins.name: multi-agent-orchestrator
plugins.description: Orchestrates multi-agent workflows with Opus/Sonnet/Haiku model tiering, DAG-based task scheduling, git worktrees for parallelism, and self-correction loops. Use for complex features, system design, large refactoring, or any task that benefits from decomposition into parallel subtasks.
